baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Update the Makefile verify target and keep CI aligned.
evals.expected_output: A Makefile and CI update that preserves canonical quality gates and documents any changed commands.
assertions: Reads existing Makefile targets before editing.
Keeps CI and Makefile commands aligned.
Preserves relevant lint, test, build, and security gates.
Runs the updated target or focused equivalent.
